items.name_cn:
【Highest Market Version, Welcome to Compare】
This Rider Backpack features a minimalist silhouette and a classic academic style full of vitality. Inspired by the Dior men's collection, it reinterprets black-grey and black jacquard fabric with Oblique print throughout. Continuing the classic design with exquisite details like a double zipper closure, a large front zipper pocket, and an adjustable padded shoulder strap, it is an ideal choice for daily styling.
Back reinforced with padded mesh fabric, embossed DIOR logo
Front metal-plated metal DIOR logo
Double zipper closure
Black nylon adjustable padded shoulder strap with black calfskin details
Top leather handle
Front zipper pocket
Internal slip pocket
Model: 1VOBA088#(Small)
Dimensions: 26 x 37 x 15 cm

items.name_cn:
【Highest Market Version, Welcome to Compare】
RIDER Backpack
Beige Dior Oblique Jacquard
Beige Rider Backpack made of Dior Oblique jacquard accented with calfskin. Made of classic pattern and lightweight jacquard material that contrasts with the casual design, it can be easily used as a daily item. Spacious internal storage can hold a 15-inch laptop, documents, iPad, etc. The single front zipper pocket allows for easy storage and retrieval of wallets, phones, earphones, keys, and other personal items.
Beige Dior Oblique jacquard with leather piping
Front palladium-finish Dior signature hardware
Internal Dior signature embossing
Adjustable nylon padded shoulder strap with leather piping
Calfskin top handle
Top zipper closure
Single front zipper pocket
Handbag or shoulder carry
Dimensions: 30 x 42 x 15 mm
Includes dust bag
Made in Italy
Item Number: 1VOBA088YZY_H54E

items.name_cn:
🌟New Small Backpack
This nylon backpack is part of Prada's classic design, embodying the brand's key traits: innovative materials, luxurious practicality, and a reinterpretation of classics. Crafted from Re-Nylon regenerated nylon derived from purified ocean plastic, it balances a modern look with a minimalist design, showcasing a stylish and elegant charm while remaining lightweight and practical.
Size: 23.5x28x12cm
Style: 1BZ677 Silver Buckle

specs.rawTitle:
🌟New Small Backpack
This nylon backpack is part of Prada's classic design, embodying the brand's key traits: innovative materials, luxurious practicality, and a reinterpretation of classics. Crafted from Re-Nylon regenerated nylon derived from purified ocean plastic, it balances a modern look with a minimalist design, showcasing a stylish and elegant charm while remaining lightweight and practical.
Size: 23.5x28x12cm
Style: 1BZ677 Silver Buckle

items.name_cn:
🌟Parachute Nylon Backpack
P's most classic, bestselling, and versatile backpack. Lightweight, rain-resistant, and with moderate capacity, it offers effortless styling for travel. Imported parachute fabric - waterproof and sun-proof. Front enamel logo with cross-grain calfskin trim. Drawstring inner pocket + two front zipper pockets. Meets the needs for refined storage.
Size: 28×23.5×12cm
Style: 1BZ677

items.name_en: 💖 Comes with a complete set of original green box packaging 💖 [New] Ophidia Series Mini Backpack. The Ophidia series blends Gucci's traditional heritage with modern design to present a striking new piece. This backpack is crafted from beige and white GG Supreme canvas, featuring a classic webbing design that infuses the brand's essence. An adjustable shoulder strap adds a modern touch. Beige and white GG Supreme canvas, oatmeal leather trim, gold-tone hardware, red and green striped webbing, brown cotton-linen lining, double G handles. Height: 6cm, adjustable leather shoulder strap (length adjustable between 31cm and 35cm). Weight: approx. 0.55kg.

items.name_en: 💰M12617 Top-tier Original Pooch Bag Dynamic Code This model. The Pooch Bag condenses Louis Vuitton classic design elements into a compact structure. The Monogram canvas body features vintage edging, leather is used for the top handle, handle attachments, and adjustable shoulder strap, creating a comfortable handheld and crossbody experience. The LV Lovers tag showcases Pharrell Williams' creative touch. 18.0 x 28.0 x 19.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_cn:
25P mini Panda🐼 color shoulder bag
The mini shoulder bag fits my aesthetic perfectly. Made of lambskin with a quilted design. Features a small front pocket with no unnecessary details. Despite its small size, it fits a phone, lipstick, compact, tissues, and other small items. More importantly, it offers multiple carrying styles: backpack, shoulder bag, crossbody, handbag, etc. You can carry it however you like.
size:22*18*10cm99473

items.name_en: A2210 Large In Stock Chane🌱Vintage Backpack
items.name_cn:
A2210 Large In Stock Chane🌱Vintage Backpack
It's no exaggeration to say this is a vintage backpack that can be passed down! Classic double C logo, quilted pattern
Paired with a gold metal leather chain strap, it feels substantial
Sheepskin is soft and delicate, making it impossible not to want to own and cherish it! Suitable for all seasons, any style💃
Must-have in your bag closet, available in black
Dimensions: 21*10*20.5cm.
1091063
